metadata.title: Karava | Complete Funeral Services Chiang Mai
metadata.description: Complete funeral services in Chiang Mai. All traditions and religions supported. Every farewell, with reverence.
metadata.keywords: funeral services Chiang Mai, funeral planning Thailand, Buddhist funeral, cremation services, expat funeral Thailand

hero.headline: Every farewell, with reverence
hero.subheadline: Complete funeral services in Chiang Mai — all traditions and religions supported

packages.title: Service Packages
packages.subtitle: Choose the package that fits your needs

services.title: Add-on Services
services.subtitle: Choose additional services to fit your needs

1.name: Consultation & Intake
1.description: We listen to the family's needs, provide guidance on ceremonies, packages, and budget.

2.name: Venue/Temple Booking
2.description: We coordinate temple hall or venue reservation based on family's preference.

3.name: Body Collection
3.description: Respectful collection of the deceased from hospital or designated location.

5.name: Water Blessing Ceremony
5.description: Traditional water blessing ceremony for family and loved ones to pay respects.

6.name: Coffin Flower Arrangement
6.description: Beautiful floral arrangement for the coffin front, within the chosen budget.

7.name: Merit Items Preparation
7.description: Preparation of merit-making items for offering to monks during chanting.

8.name: Nightly Chanting
8.description: Monks invited for nightly Buddhist chanting for the designated evenings.

9.name: Morning Merit Ceremony
9.description: Morning alms and merit ceremony with food offerings to monks.

10.name: Cremation Ceremony
10.description: Dignified cremation ceremony with full oversight through completion.

11.name: Ash Collection
11.description: Careful collection and placement of ashes in the chosen container.

12.name: Ash Floating
12.description: Ash floating ceremony at the Ping River, conducted with reverence.

13.name: Handover & Follow-up
13.description: Complete handover of all items and post-ceremony follow-up care.

complete.title: Complete Service
complete.description: We handle everything from intake to ash floating.

professional.title: Professional Team
professional.description: An experienced team that cares with compassion.

allTraditions.title: All Traditions
allTraditions.description: Buddhist, Christian, Chinese, secular, or custom.

transparent.title: Transparent Pricing
transparent.description: Clear pricing with no hidden costs.

available.title: 24/7 Availability
available.description: Consultation and service available around the clock.

chiangmai.title: Chiang Mai Coverage
chiangmai.description: Serving Chiang Mai and surrounding areas.

testimonials.title: From the Families We Serve
testimonials.subtitle: Trust from the families we have cared for

story.title: Our Story
story.content: Karava was founded with the commitment to provide professional, respectful, and fairly-priced funeral services for every family in Chiang Mai. We understand that loss is a difficult time, and we are here to ease the burden — caring for every detail so that families can grieve in peace.

respect.title: Respect
respect.description: Every ceremony is conducted with respect for the deceased and their family.

care.title: Care
care.description: Attention to every detail, as if caring for our own family.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.description: Clear pricing and details with no hidden costs.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Ready to help. Contact us anytime.

success.title: Thank you for reaching out
success.message: We have received your information. A team member will contact you within 30 minutes.

inquiryCta.title: Ready to Help
inquiryCta.subtitle: Contact us anytime. Our team is available 24 hours.
